chapters.title: — Headline: Effect, Numbers, and the Transmission Signal
— Headline: Practice Impact and the Screening Policy Question
— Round 1: Kjaer / FMF PE Algorithm by Conception Mode
— Round 2: Sorrenti / ISUOG vs. Delphi in MCDA sFGR
— Round 3: Schenone / IUT for Tumor-Related Fetal Anemia
— Round 4: Cai / Rhabdomyoma, MRI + Trio-WES, TSC Prediction
— Close: What to Watch, What's Unsettled

follow_up_links.reason: First national-scale evidence that the 2020 valacyclovir RCT translated into real-world practice change and reduced vertical CMV transmission
follow_up_links.title: Changing trends in prenatal screening and treatment of cytomegalovirus infection in France: 7-year national cohort study (2017-2023)

follow_up_links.reason: Demonstrates that FMF PE screening algorithm performance varies by ART type, signaling need for mode-specific recalibration
follow_up_links.title: Predictive performance of Fetal Medicine Foundation first-trimester screening algorithm for pre-eclampsia according to conception mode

follow_up_links.reason: Head-to-head comparison of sFGR criteria in MCDA twins clarifies prognostic differences and classification discordance
follow_up_links.title: Perinatal outcome of monochorionic twin pregnancy complicated by selective fetal growth restriction: ISUOG vs Delphi diagnostic criteria

follow_up_links.reason: Best available synthesis of IUT outcomes for tumor-related fetal anemia, guiding counseling for a rare indication
follow_up_links.title: Perinatal outcomes following intrauterine transfusion for fetal anemia secondary to fetal or placental tumor: systematic review

follow_up_links.reason: Multimodal approach (MRI plus trio-WES) improves prenatal TSC prediction in fetuses with cardiac rhabdomyoma
follow_up_links.title: Prenatal diagnosis of cardiac rhabdomyoma: implications for predicting tuberous sclerosis complex and guiding perinatal management

key_claims.claim: Valacyclovir adoption in France after the 2020 RCT led to increased screening uptake and reduced vertical CMV transmission rates at the national level
FMF first-trimester preeclampsia screening algorithm performance differs by conception mode, with frozen embryo transfer and donor-egg ART showing distinct risk profiles
ISUOG and Delphi criteria for selective FGR in MCDA twins identify overlapping but not identical populations and differ in prognostic performance
Intrauterine transfusion for fetal anemia from fetal or placental tumors is feasible with characterized but heterogeneous outcomes
Combining fetal MRI and trio-WES improves prenatal TSC prediction in fetuses with cardiac rhabdomyoma; tumor number and distribution correlate with diagnosis
